ai_summary: This document confirms Alembic Limited's compliance with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, indicating that its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, MUFG Intime India Private Limited, correctly processed share dematerialization requests within regulatory timelines. This routine filing assures the integrity of the company's share registry operations and the efficiency of converting physical shares to electronic form, with no material impacts or red flags identified.
